meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solve Version Control with Antigravity
content.seo_description: Stop losing work. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to implement version control instantly. A beginner-friendly checklist for freelancers.
content.answer_block: The 'no version control' trap is a silent project killer. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you standardize your repository structure, enabling seamless integration with Claude Code. This combination enforces atomic commits, automated branching, and immediate rollback capabilities, ensuring your freelance work remains professional, recoverable, and scalable from day one.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’re three hours deep into a client feature, the code is finally humming, and then—catastrophe. A rogue refactor, a deleted file, or a corrupted environment wipes your progress. Without version control, you aren't just losing time; you're losing professional credibility and thousands of dollars in billable hours.

But it doesn't have to be this way. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural safety net. When paired with the raw speed of Claude Code, you transform from a solo developer struggling with manual backups into a high-velocity AI builder with enterprise-grade reliability.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your project structure immediately to ensure Git compatibility and automated configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project template with Git initialized, a standard .gitignore for Node/Python, and a README structure optimized for freelance client handovers.

steps.title: Configure Atomic Commit Hooks
steps.description: Prevent 'code bloat' by ensuring every change is tracked and meaningful.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up pre-commit hooks that validate code style and require a descriptive commit message before allowing a push to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm install husky --save-dev && npx husky install'

steps.title: Establish Branching Strategy
steps.description: Separate your production-ready code from experimental features to avoid breaking the client demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branching strategy template that separates 'main' (stable) from 'develop' (feature work) and automatically tags production releases.

steps.title: Automate Documentation with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate changelogs based on your commit history so your clients always know what was shipped.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the last 10 commits and generate a professional CHANGELOG.md file formatted for client review.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a changelog from the last 10 commits and append it to CHANGELOG.md'

steps.title: Implement Remote Sync
steps.description: Push your local progress to a secure cloud provider to ensure redundancy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a remote origin to the current project and push all branches to the configured repository.

pro_tips: Always commit before running Claude Code on a complex refactor; use the 'git stash' command if you need a clean slate.
Use 'Conventional Commits' (e.g., feat:, fix:, docs:) to make your history readable for non-technical clients.
Keep your .env files out of version control by using a .env.example template; this is the #1 security mistake freelancers make.
Run 'claude diff' before every commit to review exactly what the AI changed; never blindly trust an automated push.
Create a 'release' branch for client demos so you can keep building new features without disrupting their testing environment.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book
content.next_steps: Once your first project is under version control, start building a library of reusable snippets within your Antigravity template to reduce your development time by 30% per project.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping with professional-grade safety. You have the tools; now execute with precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
